scope: Bluff-hunt session-level summary aggregating all mutation rehearsals across Phases 0-6 of this session. Per Seventh Law clause 5 + §6.N production-code coverage requirement.

outcome: No surviving bluffs. The 27+ mutation rehearsals (across the 8-phase follow-up sequence + the earlier pkg/vm bundled cycle) collectively prove every gate-shaping line is falsifiable against its claimed production behavior.
next_phase: Phase 7 — release tag. See PHASE-7-READINESS.md in the same pack dir for what's complete vs. operator-required.
